reviews.comment:
Pase por un servicio en YPF Boxes y la verdad que súper conforme con la atención recibida (el servicio fue sin demoras) la tienda FULL tiene todo lo necesario para realizar la espera mientras realizan el servicio de cambio de aceite y filtros, para destacar la limpieza de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
I went for a service at YPF Boxes and I was truly delighted with the service I received (the service was prompt). The store has everything you need to fill your wait while the oil and filter changes are performed. The restrooms are also clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2podldFOTZVVEZ5WkhNd05XVlNlRFZJVURoRlNtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente como todas las YPF. Buena comida buenos precios mejor atención baños limpios. Más no se puede pedir.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, like all YPF stations. Good food, good prices, great service, clean restrooms. You can't ask for more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOWk4zSkZTa1pGVm0wdFdtdDNkMHhzZFcxeGJtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a la tienda y al baño. Todo muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
I went to the store and the bathroom. Everything was fine.

reviews.comment:
Al cargar nafta ni te ofrecen limpiar vidrios ni revisar el aceite. El que me atendia se rajó a conversar con los compañeros

(Translated by Google)
When you fill up with gas, they don't even offer to clean the windows or check the oil. The guy who was helping me went off to chat with his coworkers.
